title: Lamb Kebabs with Croatian Spices
description: A flavorful and spicy lamb kebab recipe inspired by Croatian cuisine, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together paprika, garlic, salt, black pepper, and Croatian-style lamb spice mix.
Add olive oil and red wine vinegar to the bowl and mix well.
Cut the lamb shoulder into 1-inch cubes and add to the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread lamb cubes, red bell pepper slices, and onion slices onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 63°C (145°F).
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano if desired.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as grilled vegetables or a salad.
